notes: Input address (1272 E 5th St, Brooklyn, NY 11230) matches the NY DOS principal address for Monroe Bus Lines Inc (DOS ID 5555896); FMCSA SAFER snapshot lists Monroe, NY physical/mailing address (Hasidic-community charter ops). Same legal entity confirmed via DOS principal-vs-mailing reconciliation. Safety rating Satisfactory (2026-02-23); 9 inspections / 0 crashes last 24 mo. name: Northeast Pennsylvania Bus
notes: No confident match found. FMCSA SAFER name searches for NORTHEAST PENNSYLVANIA BUS, NORTHEAST PENN, NORTHEAST PA BUS, NEPA BUS, NORTHEASTERN PENNSYLVANIA returned no passenger/school-bus carriers; NORTHEAST PA hits are unrelated (property mgmt, solar, blasting, cleaning). PA SOS / opencorporates / bizapedia returned no entity. Kingston PA 18704 transport at 3rd Ave does not correspond to LCTA (315 Northampton St) or Martz/Travel Bus. Input company name likely a Data Axle alias or trade-style name without a registered corporate entity or USDOT registration in the SAFER system; may be a sole-proprietor or unregistered jitney operation, or a misnamed record. Recommend manual verification via PA file.dos.pa.gov or PennDOT school-bus operator list (Luzerne County).

name: Leland F Harris Inc
fmcsa_address: 856 RIVER RD, LINDLEY, NY 14858 (physical and mailing)
officers: Larry B. Harris (CEO); Patsy Harris reported as principal/operator
registry_source: NY Department of State, DOS ID 1184858 (Business Corporation, Steuben County)
notes: Exact match on legal name, physical address (856 River Rd, Lindley NY 14858) and NY DOS record. Multi-generational family operation; original founder Leland F. Harris (died 2/5/2010) had been transporting Corning-area students since 1939, son/successor Larry B. Harris listed as current CEO. NY DOS next biennial past due (was due 2021-07-31) but status remains active. FMCSA MCS-150 last updated 2026-04-13. School bus contractor for Corning-Painted Post School District.

name: Berlington Transporting
fmcsa_address: 4350 RED ROCK RD, BENTON, PA 17814 (physical and mailing)
entity_status: active (per Yellow Pages '39 years in business' indicating ~1986 establishment)
registry_source: PA Department of State (file.dos.pa.gov) - exact entity number not retrieved; entity is BREWINGTON TRANSPORTATION LLC
notes: Input name 'Berlington Transporting' is almost certainly a Data Axle OCR/transcription error for BREWINGTON TRANSPORTATION LLC at the same 4350 Red Rock Rd, Benton PA 17814 address; FMCSA SAFER confirms BREWINGTON TRANSPORTATION LLC at that exact street address as USDOT 2492309 with School Bus operation classification. ~39 years in business per Yellow Pages (est. ~1986). Operates Benton Area School District contract. MCS-150 last updated 2014-04-04 (overdue). A separate Brewington Transport Inc (USDOT 1314494, Hemingway SC) is unrelated freight carrier. No FMCSA carrier exists under the literal name 'Berlington Transporting'.
